verses.text: 'A new heaven and a new earth,' the first passed away; 'the holy city, new Jerusalem,' comes down 'as a bride adorned.' All new. God remakes the world and dwells with His own.
'A new heaven and a new earth,' the first passed away; 'the holy city, new Jerusalem,' comes down 'as a bride adorned.' All new. God remakes the world and dwells with His own.
'God himself shall be with them'; He shall 'wipe away all tears,' and 'there shall be no more death, neither sorrow.' No more tears. Every grief is forever gone.
'God himself shall be with them'; He shall 'wipe away all tears,' and 'there shall be no more death, neither sorrow.' No more tears. Every grief is forever gone.
He says, 'Behold, I make all things new'; 'I will give unto him that is athirst of the fountain of the water of life freely.' All new. God freely gives life to the thirsty.
He says, 'Behold, I make all things new'; 'I will give unto him that is athirst of the fountain of the water of life freely.' All new. God freely gives life to the thirsty.
'He that overcometh shall inherit all things'; but the fearful and unbelieving have their part 'in the lake which burneth.' Two ends. The faithful inherit; the faithless perish.
'He that overcometh shall inherit all things'; but the fearful and unbelieving have their part 'in the lake which burneth.' Two ends. The faithful inherit; the faithless perish.
An angel shows 'the bride, the Lamb's wife,' the holy city descending, 'having the glory of God,' bright as jasper. Glorious city. The bride shines with God's own glory.
An angel shows 'the bride, the Lamb's wife,' the holy city descending, 'having the glory of God,' bright as jasper. Glorious city. The bride shines with God's own glory.
An angel shows 'the bride, the Lamb's wife,' the holy city descending, 'having the glory of God,' bright as jasper. Glorious city. The bride shines with God's own glory.
It has 'a wall great and high,' twelve gates with angels and the tribes' names, twelve foundations bearing 'the names of the twelve apostles.' Founded. The city rests on God's people, old and new.
It has 'a wall great and high,' twelve gates with angels and the tribes' names, twelve foundations bearing 'the names of the twelve apostles.' Founded. The city rests on God's people, old and new.
It has 'a wall great and high,' twelve gates with angels and the tribes' names, twelve foundations bearing 'the names of the twelve apostles.' Founded. The city rests on God's people, old and new.
The city is measured, foursquare, its length, breadth, and height equal, vast and perfect. Measured. Its perfect form shows God's finished work.
The city is measured, foursquare, its length, breadth, and height equal, vast and perfect. Measured. Its perfect form shows God's finished work.
The city is measured, foursquare, its length, breadth, and height equal, vast and perfect. Measured. Its perfect form shows God's finished work.
The wall was jasper, the city 'pure gold, like unto clear glass,' the foundations of every precious stone. Precious. Heaven's city gleams with priceless beauty.
The wall was jasper, the city 'pure gold, like unto clear glass,' the foundations of every precious stone. Precious. Heaven's city gleams with priceless beauty.
The wall was jasper, the city 'pure gold, like unto clear glass,' the foundations of every precious stone. Precious. Heaven's city gleams with priceless beauty.
Twelve gates of pearl, streets of gold; 'I saw no temple therein,' for God and the Lamb are its temple and its light. No temple. God Himself is its sanctuary and sun.
Twelve gates of pearl, streets of gold; 'I saw no temple therein,' for God and the Lamb are its temple and its light. No temple. God Himself is its sanctuary and sun.
Twelve gates of pearl, streets of gold; 'I saw no temple therein,' for God and the Lamb are its temple and its light. No temple. God Himself is its sanctuary and sun.
The nations walk in its light, its gates never shut; nothing unclean enters, but only 'they which are written in the Lamb's book of life.' Pure city. Only the redeemed dwell there.
